### Question: Read the following passage and answer the question: What is special about the boy's face?: FRECKLES In a corner of the park, many children were lining up waiting for a painter to decorate their faces to become "Indians" or "aliens",.... A boy also held his grandmother's hand and waited for his turn. The boy's face had many small freckles, but his eyes lit up with excitement. - You have so many freckles, where is there any place on your face to draw! - The girl in line behind the boy said loudly. Embarrassed, the boy lowered his head. Seeing that, his grandmother also sat down next to him: "Why are you so sad? I love your freckles! When I was little, I always wanted freckles." Then the old woman stroked the boy's cheek with her wrinkled fingers: Freckles are also very pretty, I'm sure the painter will like your freckles!". The boy smiled. - Really, grandma? Really! - His grandmother replied.. Here, try to find something more beautiful than freckles. The boy looked at her, thought for a moment, then whispered: - Wrinkles, grandmother!
### Choices:
A: [MASKED] 
B: The boy's face has a lot of pimples.
C: There is a big scar on the face 
D: Face with many small freckles
Answer: D: Face with many small freckles
Label: Very white face.

Question:
Please fill in the <MASKED> in the question below based on your benchmark knowledge.
### Question: Read the following passage and answer the question: What season is summer in the author's mind?: THE SOUND OF THE KITE_x000D_ _x000D_ I don't know since when, but summer has been imprinted in my mind. It is the season of kites filled with wind, the season of souls with childhood aspirations._x000D_ _x000D_ Every afternoon, when the bright sunlight gradually fades, it is also the time when we children rush out to the fields, tossing small kites into the sky. Putting aside our worries about schoolwork, we long to watch the kites in the vast sky. Flying kites in the windy afternoon, listening to the whistling sound of the flute mixed with the cheers of the children. No piece of music by a genius artist can compare to that piece of music of the countryside. The sound of the flute is clear and pure like the call of summer, the call of souls searching for childhood memories._x000D_ _x000D_ I have been away from the kite wings of my childhood for quite a long time. The sound of the kite flute still lingers in my dreams, evoking a memory._x000D_ _x000D_ Another summer has come. I put on my backpack and return to my hometown with the urging sound of the kite flute. I caught the image of young boys engrossed in bamboo strips making kites like I was in the past. Suddenly, the sound of the kite flute rose up and hummed over the peaceful fields, making me stunned. I realized so many things in that flute sound... Oh. the kite flute... perhaps it will follow me throughout this life...
### Choices:
A: It is the season of delicious, fragrant fruits. 
B: [MASKED]
C: It's the season of memories of playing with friends on the windy fields. 
D: It is the season of kites filled with wind, of souls yearning for childhood.
Answer: It is the season of kites filled with wind, of souls yearning for childhood.
Label: It's the season of lullabies every summer afternoon.

C: (1) and (3) 
D: (2) and (3) [/INST]   The content of choice A is:

Gene mutations are often harmful to organisms because they can disrupt the normal functioning of proteins and other cellular components, leading to a variety of diseases and other health problems. However, gene mutations still play an important role in evolution because they can provide a source of genetic variation that can be selected for or against by natural selection. This process can lead to the evolution of new traits and adaptations that can give an organism a competitive advantage in its environment. Additionally
